hero.title: Learn languages by actually speaking them
hero.subtitle: Practice real conversations with AI tutors who adapt to your level, correct your mistakes, and help you build vocabulary — all through natural voice.
tutors.title: Meet Your Tutors
tutors.subtitle: 10 characters, 10 languages
tutors.description: Each tutor brings their own warmth, style, and teaching approach. Hover to hear them speak!
features.title: Everything you need to actually improve
features.subtitle: Not just a chatbot. A complete learning system that turns every conversation into progress.
features.voice.title: Talk Like You Mean It
features.voice.desc: Just speak. Your tutor responds instantly — no buttons, no pauses. Like talking to a real person.
features.errors.title: See Every Mistake
features.errors.desc: Every error highlighted, explained, and corrected after each conversation.
features.vocab.title: Words That Stick
features.vocab.desc: New words saved automatically. Smart flashcards bring them back at the perfect time.
features.scenarios.title: 44+ Real Scenarios
features.scenarios.desc: Café, job interview, airport, hotel — or just chat freely. Your tutor adapts to any topic.
features.level.title: Adapts to Your Level
features.level.desc: From total beginner to near-native. Vocabulary and complexity adjust as you improve.
features.progress.title: Track Your Progress
features.progress.desc: Charts, streaks, and scores — see how far you've come and what still needs work.
features.pronunciation.title: Pronunciation Training
features.pronunciation.desc: Dedicated exercises to practice your accent, plus feedback after every conversation.
howItWorks.title: From zero to speaking in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated setup. No textbooks. Just start talking.
howItWorks.step1.title: Pick a language
howItWorks.step1.desc: Choose from 10 languages — Spanish, English, German, French, Italian, and more. Set your CEFR level from A1 (beginner) to C2 (native).
howItWorks.step2.title: Choose a scenario
howItWorks.step2.desc: At a cafe, job interview, asking directions — or just go free-form. Your tutor adapts to any topic.
howItWorks.step3.title: Talk naturally
howItWorks.step3.desc: Speak with your AI tutor using voice or text. Get response suggestions when you're stuck. No judgment, just practice.
howItWorks.step4.title: Review & grow
howItWorks.step4.desc: See every mistake color-coded with corrections. Save new words to flashcards. Watch your progress on the dashboard.
pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when ready.
pricing.subtitle: Try Fonvo with no commitment. Upgrade to unlock everything.
pricing.free.name: Free
pricing.premium.name: Premium
social.quote1: I've tried Duolingo, Babbel, and others — Fonvo is the first app where I actually speak. After 2 weeks I had a real conversation in Spanish.
social.quote2: The tutors feel surprisingly real. Luna corrected my conjugation mid-sentence and I didn't even feel judged. Game changer.
social.quote3: Finally something beyond flashcards. The error analysis after each conversation shows me exactly what to work on.
cta.title: Ready to start speaking?
cta.subtitle: Join learners practicing real conversations every day. Free to start, no credit card required.
footer.tagline: The language app that actually listens.
